appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to reflect that App composes CoreRoutes (not a flat App.tsx route table), documented current route groups including rotate-keyset adaptation routes, and clarified the validation-contract exception for literal utility-style class tokens.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify agent-browser usage expectations so the procedure explicitly allows either invoking the agent-browser skill or running the approved `agent-browser --session ...` CLI workflow via Execute.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two rotate-keyset reviews observed transcript executions using direct agent-browser CLI while SKILL instructions mandate invoking the skill, causing avoidable procedure-deviation ambiguity.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit exception that literal Paper/validation token classes (e.g. `bg-[#EF44441A]`) are permitted when contract assertions require exact class evidence, to align with mission AGENTS guidance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: rotate-keyset-core-fidelity required token classes for VAL-RTK-001 while ui-builder skill currently says not to use Tailwind utility classes, creating conflicting guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate architecture-doc staleness report from multiple reviews.
Duplicate agent-browser invocation mismatch report from multiple reviews.
